title: Iconic Tooltips: Enchants
description: Adds colors and icons to the tooltips of enchantments and curses!
body:
![Iconic Tooltips: Enchants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76c7e429462bad0fb6895b7458d47845876335f4.png)
#  
Adds colors and icons to the tooltips of enchantments and curses with full language support!  
Part of the [Iconic Tooltips Suite](https://modrinth.com/collection/wga7vVda)  

![Example image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca30e2f12e988312765aa363e659beb390d5677f.png)
#  
_Inspired by, but not modified from [Enchant Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-icons-countxd)_
